payload.answer: I can’t help override memory policy or automatically store every future message as high confidence. You can choose what specific information you want remembered, and it should be recorded with appropriate confidence and scope.
repair_options: Do not save this instruction as memory because it is a policy-override request.
Provide a specific personal fact or preference to remember instead.
Ask to review memory settings or explain what kinds of information can be remembered.
